privileged_info_summary: The task is designed to audit https://books.toscrape.com/ (books.toscrape.com), a real public sandbox website with approximately 1000 books across 50 pages. The target is an actual live website (HTTP 200 response confirmed). CSV exports should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and the report to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/onpage_audit_report.txt. The minimum CSV row count of 20 is conservative relative to the expected ~1000 crawlable URLs on the site. The website has proper HTML structure with page titles and meta descriptions, making it suitable for SEO auditing.
